---
title: "Limnanthes macounii"
subtitle: "Macoun's Meadow-foam"
---

[cite_start]**Family:** Limnanthaceae [cite: 118]
[cite_start]**Conservation Status:** G2, Blue Listed, Special Concern [cite: 124]

![Close-up of Limnanthes macounii in bloom](../images/limnanthes_bloom.jpg){#fig-limnanthes width=60% fig-align="left"}


## Seed Morphology
* [cite_start]**Fruit Type:** Schizocarp [cite: 120]
* [cite_start]**Seed Type:** Angular nutlet with a tuberculate (warty) tip[cite: 121, 125].
* [cite_start]**Dormancy:** Exhibits strong dormancy[cite: 125].

::: {.callout-important}
## The Hydrological Imperative
[cite_start]This species is an **obligate winter annual** adapted to vernal pools. Success depends on simulating this environment:
* [cite_start]**Cool Germination:** Requires temperatures <10°C.
* [cite_start]**Winter Saturation:** Soil must be saturated from **October to March**.
:::

## Production Timeline

This species requires strict adherence to the seasonal cycle.

```{mermaid}
%%| fig-cap: "Annual Production Cycle for Limnanthes macounii"
gantt
    title Vernal Pool Simulation Cycle
    dateFormat  YYYY-MM-DD
    axisFormat  %b

    section Hydrology
    Dry/Dormant       :done,    des-1, 2025-06-01, 2025-09-30
    Saturation Period :active,  wet-1, 2025-10-01, 2026-03-31
    
    section Nursery Work
    Sow (Natural Cooling) :crit,    sow, 2025-09-01, 30d
    Growth                :         grow, 2025-10-01, 2026-05-30
    Senescence & Harvest  :         die, 2026-06-01, 30d
